name: Pro Transportation
registry_source: Florida Sunbiz (no confident match for Lake Worth Beach address)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for a 'Pro Transportation' at 1910 7th Ave N, Lake Worth Beach, FL. The only SAFER 'PRO TRANSPORTATION' (USDOT 3643558) is in Bayville, NJ - WRONG company. BBB lists Pro Transportation at 1910 7th Ave N, Lake Worth Beach, FL 33461-3807, phone (561) 886-0890, A+ rating, BBB file opened 1/7/2020, classified as Medical Transportation. Sunbiz has a 'PROTRANSPORTATION INC' (P15000039157) filed 4/30/2015 but principal address is 1200 N Federal Hwy Ste 200, Boca Raton, FL (officers: Kelly Gonzalez, Pearl Goldblatt) - address doesn't match Lake Worth Beach so likely DIFFERENT entity. Company appears to be intrastate non-emergency medical transport (no FMCSA registration required).

name: Willamette Valley Transport
registry_source: Oregon SOS Business Registry (not directly retrievable - SOS search blocked by security/CAPTCHA at time of query)
notes: Founded September 2000 by Tim McClain in Salem, Oregon (per company website wvtransport.com). Currently operates 70+ vehicles across offices in Portland, Salem, and Eugene. Serves Marion, Polk, Yamhill counties in Oregon. Reported ~16-17 employees and $10.3M revenue (RocketReach). No FMCSA SAFER record matches - SAFER wildcard '*WILLAMETTE*' returned only other Willamette-named entities (e.g., WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMPANY LLC DOT 47150 is different). Company is intrastate medical/passenger transport, likely not FMCSA-registered. Oregon SOS site returned cybersecurity-block error during attempts to verify registration date/number; inc_date 2000-09 based on company website self-disclosure.

name: Cove Taxi
registry_source: Texas SOS / Comptroller (not directly retrievable via WebFetch; Texas SOSDirect requires login)
notes: Cove Taxi closed permanently on 9/30/2022 after 26 years; owners Clarence and Patricia Page retired (reported by Killeen Daily Herald 8/2022). Founded March 1996 in Copperas Cove, TX at 806 N 1st St. No FMCSA SAFER record found for Cove Taxi in TX - wildcard '*COVE TAXI*' returned only WEIR-COVE TAXI (COLALELLA CORPORATION USDOT 1254631) in Weirton WV which is unrelated. As a small intrastate taxi service in TX, FMCSA registration was likely not required. Texas SOS/Comptroller search not directly retrievable; LinkedIn shows 'COVE TAXI, INC.' as an entity name suggesting it was incorporated in Texas.
